title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 509.160 - Particularity required in all averments of fraud or mistake
text:
509.160.  Particularity required in all averments of fraud or mistake. — In all averments of fraud or mistake, the circumstances constituting fraud or mistake shall be stated with particularity.  Malice, intent, knowledge, and other condition of mind of a person may be averred generally.
(L. 1943 p. 353 § 47)
